title: Tom Acton
compiled_truth: Tom Acton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-22 to 2001-06-12), Tom Acton sent 74 and received 307 emails, totalling 381 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (71), [Vance Taylor](people/vance-taylor) (26), [Julie Meyers](people/julie-meyers) (12), [Lisa Hesse](people/lisa-hesse) (11), [Susan Smith](people/susan-smith) (10). Mailbox folders observed: entex, logistics.
